executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON index file containing keywords and one-sentence summaries for multiple project files, including server code, HTML, and configuration files.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to the DeepSeek chat completion API, supporting streaming (SSE) and non-streaming responses, and returns appropriate errors.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to a Railway API endpoint, extracting a dynamic path suffix from the request URL and attaching an authentication token.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl search API, returning structured search results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: This edge function serves the GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables via a GET request, with CORS headers.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: This edge function proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and returning results or error.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to OpenRouter chat completions API, handling authentication, streaming, and error responses.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: During deploy-preview builds, injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html to hide the login gate and show the root content.

preferences.json.summary: Editable preferences for a self-improving bot, including custom prompts, planning rules, execution style, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: Main chat component with message handling, task display, run state tracking, error logging, and token budget indicator.

src/components/SimpleChat/ChatPane.js.summary: Renders chat messages as styled bubbles and optionally shows a RunCard during execution, with mobile responsiveness.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Header component for SimpleChat with repo and branch inputs, responsive layout with mobile support using workspace store.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: InputBar component with text input and send button for chat, responsive to mobile with onKeyDown support.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: MessageList component renders chat messages with user and agent styling, auto-scrolls on new messages.

src/components/SimpleChat/RunCard.js.summary: RunCard component shows current run state with expandable logs/files/tasks sections, phase indicators, and pause button.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: TaskList component renders a scrollable list of tasks with status indicators and colors.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A lightweight React component that renders a fixed-position toast notification with conditional border color based on whether it's an error or success message.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: SelfImprover class manages the self-improvement lifecycle, accepting configuration for repository, branch, LLM provider, and various callbacks to log and report progress.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates file summaries, observations, and plan data during agent execution, providing a compact context string for LLM prompts.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: chunkedBuildIndex processes repository files in groups of five, using an LLM to extract 5-10 keywords and a summary per file, then commits the resulting keyword index.

src/core/execution/agenticExecutor.js.summary: executeTaskAgentic runs a task by loading target files, building execution prompts, applying search-replace edits, and verifying commits through a loop with quality checks.

src/core/execution/commitVerifier.js.summary: Exports verifyCommit() which loads a committed file from GitHub, compares its SHA to an expected value, and logs a warning on mismatch, returning false on verification failure.

src/core/execution/promptBuilder.js.summary: Exports buildExecutionPrompt() which assembles an LLM prompt from memory, file contents, manifest, and context from ContextBuilder, instructing the model to produce SEARCH/REPLACE blocks for code changes.

src/core/execution/qualityGate.js.summary: Exports qualityGateWithRetry() which lints target files (JS/CSS) up to 3 attempts, triggers LLM to fix errors with SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, and returns true if no errors remain.

src/core/execution/searchReplaceHandler..summary: Exports applySearchReplaceEdits() which applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file contents, handles errors with retry, strips comments from JS/CSS, and builds a fileMap for commit.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Exports discoverFiles() which retrieves files from a keyword index or falls back to filename scanning, scores them by goal keyword matches, loads top 8 files' content, and returns the results.

src/core/goalVerifier.js.summary: Compares the feature-branch diff against the original goal by fetching the diff and using an LLM to determine if the goal is achieved, returning a verdict and reason.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Provides fuzzy command matching by indexing slash commands and using Levenshtein distance and prefix matching to find the best match for user input.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Loads manifest.json from the repository if available, otherwise builds it from source by scanning JS files and using ManifestBuilder.

src/core/manifestUpdater.js.summary: Incrementally updates the manifest by re-parsing exports and imports of modified files using static regex and recomputing importedBy relationships.

src/core/orchestration/clarificationQueu.summary: Implements a clarification queue that asks questions, saves them to conversation memory, and returns a promise that resolves when the user provides answers or a timeout occurs.

src/core/orchestration/cycleExecutor.js.summary: Runs the execute-and-review loop up to 3 cycles, performing parallel execution and review, with memory loading/saving for depth 0 and pause support.

src/core/orchestration/pauseController.j.summary: Provides a simple pause flag manager with request, check, and reset functions.

src/core/orchestration/postRunActions.js.summary: Handles all post-run actions after review passes, including self-updating the manifest, detecting regressions, verifying the goal, creating a PR, and running smoke tests.

src/core/orchestration/runSetup.js.summary: Manages run setup before planning: cross-run conversation memory, error ingestion to enrich goal, loading preferences, creating a feature branch, and initializing working memory.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks in parallel up to a concurrency limit, avoiding conflicts by skipping tasks that touch already-locked files.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Saves and loads working memory to/from the repo, scoped by a runId to avoid overwrites, with serialisation and deserialisation functions for WorkingMemory objects.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Creates a plan for a given goal using LLM to analyze discovered or candidate files and generate tasks with file paths.

src/core/planning/agenticPlanner.js.summary: Uses an iterative agent loop to explore candidate files, read them, and build a plan until ready, with support for hierarchical sub-goals.

src/core/planning/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Groups candidate files by directory, launches parallel exploration agents per directory, then a coordinator merges summaries into a plan with optional subGoals.

src/core/planning/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals with dependencies, based on LLM decision to decompose.

src/core/planning/plannerFactory.js.summary: Exports a createPlan function that selects between coordinated or agentic planner based on discovery cache size and delegates to hierarchicalPlan.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Exports createPR which creates a GitHub pull request with a title derived from the goal and returns the URL.

src/core/regressionDetector.js.summary: Exports detectRegressions which iterates over affected files, uses LLM to check if any imported symbols are missing from changed files, and returns regression details.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Exports reviewAll and reviewTask which compare original and committed file contents, use LLM to check alignment with goal, and mark tasks as passed or todo.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Exports task queue initialization and status management functions for tracking task progress.

src/core/taskQueueUtils.js.summary: Exports a topological sort function that orders tasks by their dependency graph using depth-first traversal, handling cycles by skipping temp-marked nodes.

src/main.js.summary: Main entry point for a React application that initializes a SelfImprover service with GitHub, LLM, and other services, and loads a GitHub token from Netlify if not stored locally.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Provides static methods to load and save preferences to a GitHub repo, merging with defaults, used for agent customization.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Manages cross-run agent memory keyed by repo and branch in localStorage, storing goal, phase, decisions, open questions, and failed attempts.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses JavaScript stack traces to extract file paths and line numbers, then builds a prioritized error context string for the planner.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides a static API class to call executor functions (lint, syntax, health) through a Netlify edge proxy that injects Railway auth tokens, with fail-open behavior for network errors ensuring no secrets reach the browser.

src/services/github.js.summary: A service class to interact with GitHub's REST API for fetching file trees, loading file content (base64 decoded), and committing multiple files to a repository branch using a personal access token.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Provides a single point to call language models through Netlify edge proxies, supporting DeepSeek and OpenRouter with configurable timeout, thinking mode, and reasoning effort.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly (contains root element and no syntax errors), with configurable timeout and interval.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: A Zustand store with persistence to manage LLM provider selection, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort, stored in local storage under 'provider-storage'.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Defines a Zustand store with persistence for managing workspace state including current repository, branch, GitHub token, and rememberKeys flag.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies to extract structured actions including legacy update_editor blocks, Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, and read file requests, returning modified reply and actions object.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Builds a prompt context string by selecting target files and their related imports/importedBy from a manifest, respecting a token budget, and returns an ordered list of file paths or full context.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph for JavaScript files by parsing ES module imports/exports, resolving relative paths, and computing reverse dependencies (importedBy).

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Runs code in a sandboxed iframe with pre-loaded modules (GitHubService, LLMProvider, etc.) and executes a healthCheck on a SelfImprover instance, resolving false on error or timeout.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file content using a matching cascade (exact then whitespace-flexible) and returns detailed errors for LLM to fix.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes JS/CSS comments and blank lines to reduce prompt size.
